final_answer: Source records show the requested commerce action is not yet authorized. The controlling control record says the required dependency is missing, stale, mismatched, or scoped to a different action, and the boundary note forbids borrowing approval across cost centers. Escalate until the cart owner and cost center are exactly matched.
